narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 5-A (precinct in Scioto County) has 415 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.2 percentage points.
